description: Right side of a court record, so only a few words from the beginning of each line are preserved. Mentions Yehuda Beḥir ha-Yeshiva; quotes someone's speech to his son; sending good or money; the eventuality that if the ships do not arrive; the winter in the Maghrib; and something "Abū ʿImr[ān] asked me."
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
